_comment_1: Copy into any Claude Code project's .claude/settings.json (or merge the `hooks` entry into an existing one). Replace /path/to/tebis with the absolute path to your local tebis checkout.
_comment_2: UserPromptSubmit injects a summarize-at-end instruction so Claude's final message ends with a short conclusion. Stop/SubagentStop extract the tail of that message and send it to the bridge via its local UDS. Notification forwards permission prompts and idle pings — useful when you're away from the laptop.
_comment_3: Remove any of the four hook blocks to opt out of that event type.
